text: Title: MENJADIKAN MADRASAH SEBAGAI SITUS PENGAMAT PENDIDIKAN KARAKTER MELALUI KULTUR KITABUN AL-KARIM IN MADRASAH ALIYAH SWASTA AMALIYAH SUNGGAL Abstract Abstract This study aimed to investigate the implementation of religious character education through the culture of Quranic literacy in Madrasah Aliyah Swasta Amaliyah Sunggal. In addition, this research aimed to understand how the implementation of Quranic literacy culture in Madrasah Aliyah Swasta Amaliyah Sunggal is related to the students’ religious character and their behavior in schools. This study used qualitative descriptive approach by collecting the data through field observation, interviews with the relevant stakeholders and by gathering the documentary materials. The data obtained were processed through the reduction, presentation and conclusion. The validity test of data used triangulation. The results showed that the implementation of Quranic literacy culture through learning material and the activity in Madrasah Aliyah Swasta Amaliyah Sunggal succeeded in changing students’ behavior toward a more organized life, increased their sense of morality and strengthened their religious identity. Some of the problems faced by the school in implementing character education through the culture of Quranic literacy were lack of interest from students, the teachers’ lack of specialized competence, heavy academic syllabus and the abundance of the virtual world. The authors’ suggestions for the improvement of students’ religious character are the empowerment of teacher’s competence, optimal arrangement of time and activities and the involvement of parents and the community toward the success of the program.
